scripts.build: node tools/scripts/run-cargo.mjs build --workspace && pnpm --filter @freecell/contracts build && pnpm --filter @freecell/design-tokens build && pnpm --filter @freecell/web build
scripts.format: node tools/scripts/run-cargo.mjs fmt --all && pnpm -r --if-present run format
scripts.lint: node tools/scripts/run-cargo.mjs fmt --all --check && node tools/scripts/run-cargo.mjs clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && pnpm -r --if-present run lint
scripts.test: node tools/scripts/run-cargo.mjs test --workspace && python -m pytest tests/engine && pnpm --filter @freecell/e2e test
scripts.test:engine: node tools/scripts/run-cargo.mjs test --workspace && python -m pytest tests/engine
